basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Project Associate -1 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in areas related to Theoretical computer science
qualification.details: PhD in areas related to Theoretical computer science. Desirable: Previous work in parameterized algorithms, approximation algorithms, and graph algorithms.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Project Associate -1 Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate -1 position at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Project Associate -1 position at IIT Guwahati is 28th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate -1 post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in areas related to Theoretical Computer Science. Previous work in specific algorithms is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate -1 role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,850 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate -1 position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate -1 post at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q9. When will the shortlisted candidates be informed?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email on 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the date of the online interview?
faq.answer: The online interview for the Project Associate -1 position is scheduled to be held on 30th June 2026.
